texto: And everyone is always saying that marriage is really hard and takes a lot of work. But the thing is, when you know that you love someone, those things don’t matter. You have to push all the everyday things and the outside world away, and just enjoy knowing that this is the man who has the chest your head is meant to lie on.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Erin McCarthy sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “And everyone is always saying that marriage is really hard and takes a lot of work. But the thing…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, advice, love, útil em momentos de casamento e trabalho.

frase_original: And everyone is always saying that marriage is really hard and takes a lot of work. But the thing is, when you know that you love someone, those things don’t matter. You have to push all the everyday things and the outside world away, and just enjoy knowing that this is the man who has the chest your head is meant to lie on.
